title: Spinach occasion cake
excerpt: Ingredients Crust 240 g cake flour 230 g butter 150 g grated Cheddar cheese (mature cheese is the most flavourful) Filling 1 x 750 g packet frozen spinach 45 ml sunflower oil 250 g finely chopped bacon 1 large onion, finely chopped 1 large garlic clove, crushed 300 g sliced mushrooms salt and pepper to taste dried …
html:
Ingredients

Crust

  • 240 g cake flour
  • 230 g butter
  • 150 g grated Cheddar cheese (mature cheese is the most flavourful)

Filling

  • 1 x 750 g packet frozen spinach
  • 45 ml sunflower oil
  • 250 g finely chopped bacon
  • 1 large onion, finely chopped
  • 1 large garlic clove, crushed
  • 300 g sliced mushrooms, salt and pepper to taste
  • dried oregano to taste
  • 100 g grated cheddar cheese

Topping

  • 3 jumbo eggs
  • 150 g cottage cheese
  • 100 ml milk
  • 1 wheel feta cheese

Method

To make the crust, process all the ingredients in a food processor until combined and beginning to clump around the blade in large pieces.

Press the mixture against the base and sides of a loose-bottomed pan (or 4 – 6 smaller loose-bottomed pans). Leave in the fridge for 15 minutes.

To make the filling, prepare the spinach as recommended on the packaging; let it cool, drain and then press it thoroughly to get it good and dry.

Sauté the bacon, onions, mushrooms and garlic in the oil until cooked.

Add the cooked spinach and seasonings and mix thoroughly.

Spoon the filling into the crust (or crusts) and sprinkle grated cheese over.

For the topping, whisk together all the ingredients except the feta cheese.

Pour the mixture over the filling.

Then crumble the feta cheese over and bake for about 35 – 40 min in the oven at 180°C or until cooked and set.

Serves 6

Serve with roasted cherry tomatoes or a lovely mixed salad.

Easy!
